SubLayerProcessing.SQLScript:

	,PlanMemberID
	,SubscriberID
	,StartDate

FROM (
		SELECT
			 ClientID
			,FileID

			,TransactionType
			,UniquePersonKey
			,PlanMemberID
			,SubscriberID

			,hash(
					concat(IfNull(ClientID,"")

					,"|",IfNull(LastName,"")
					,"|",IfNull(FirstName,"")
					,"|",IfNull(MiddleInitial,"")
					,"|",IfNull(Title,"")
					,"|",IfNull(Suffix,"")

					,"|",IfNull(EnrolleeUniqueID,"")
					,"|",IfNull(DateofBirth,"")
					,"|",IfNull(DeceasedDate,"")

					,"|",IfNull(PermanentAddressLine3,"")

					,"|",IfNull(PermanentCounty,"")

					,"|",IfNull(PermanentSCC,"")
					,"|",IfNull(PermanentZipCode,"")

					,"|",IfNull(MailingAddressLine2,"")
					,"|",IfNull(MailingAddressLine3,"")
					,"|",IfNull(MailingCity,"")
					,"|",IfNull(MailingState,"")
					,"|",IfNull(MailingZipCode,"")
					,"|",IfNull(MailingCounty,"")
					,"|",IfNull(BillingAddressLine1,"")
					,"|",IfNull(BillingAddressLine2,"")
					,"|",IfNull(BillingAddressLine3,"")
					,"|",IfNull(BillingCity,"")
					,"|",IfNull(BillingState,"")
					,"|",IfNull(BillingZipCode,"")
					,"|",IfNull(PhoneNumber,"")
					,"|",IfNull(AlternatePhoneNumber,"")
					,"|",IfNull(Email,"")
					,"|",IfNull(EmergencyContactName,"")
					,"|",IfNull(EmergencyContactRelationship,"")
					,"|",IfNull(EmergencyContactPhoneNumber,"")

					,"|",IfNull(OOAProcess,"")
					,"|",IfNull(OOASource,"")
					,"|",IfNull(DateofMove,"")
					,"|",IfNull(MoveDeadline,"")
					,"|",IfNull(MedicaidID,"")
					,"|",IfNull(MedicarePartAEffDate,"")
					,"|",IfNull(MedicarePartAEndDate,"")
					,"|",IfNull(MedicarePartBEffDate,"")
					,"|",IfNull(MedicarePartBEndDate,"")
					,"|",IfNull(MedicarePartDEffDate,"")
					,"|",IfNull(MedicarePartDEndDate,"")
					,"|",IfNull(Languagecode,"")
					,"|",IfNull(AlternativeFormatLargePrint,"")
					,"|",IfNull(AlternativeFormatBraille,"")
					,"|",IfNull(AlternativeFormatAudioTape,"")
					,"|",IfNull(Fax,"")
					,"|",IfNull(InLEPProcessStatus,"")
					,"|",IfNull(POAName,"")
					,"|",IfNull(POAAddress1,"")
					,"|",IfNull(POAAddress2,"")
					,"|",IfNull(POAAddress3,"")
					,"|",IfNull(POACity,"")

					,"|",IfNull(POAState,"")

					,"|",IfNull(InPremiumDelinquencyProcess,"")
					,"|",IfNull(ThirdPartyLiabilityEffDate,"")
					,"|",IfNull(ThirdPartyLiabilityTrnDate,"")
					,"|",IfNull(OwedPremium,"")
					,"|",IfNull(CaretakerFirstName,"")
					,"|",IfNull(CaretakerLastName,"")
					,"|",IfNull(CaretakerMiddleInitial,"")
					,"|",IfNull(EthnicityCode,"")
					,"|",IfNull(EthnicityDatasource,"")
					,"|",IfNull(SpokenLanguage,"")
					,"|",IfNull(SpokenLanguagesourcecode,"")
					,"|",IfNull(WrittenLanguageCode,"")

					,"|",IfNull(OtherLanguage,"")

					,"|",IfNull(USCitizen,"")
					,"|",IfNull(AlternateKey1,"")
					,"|",IfNull(AlternateKey2,"")
					,"|",IfNull(AlternateKey3,"")
					,"|",IfNull(AlternateKey4,"")
					,"|",IfNull(AlternateKey5,"")
					,"|",IfNull(AlternateKey6,"")
					,"|",IfNull(AlternateKey7,"")
					,"|",IfNull(AlternateKey8,"")
					,"|",IfNull(AlternateKey9,"")
					,"|",IfNull(AlternateKey10,"")
					,"|",IfNull(MaskedMemberID,"")
					,"|",IfNull(EnrolleeEducation,"")
					,"|",IfNull(EnrolleeEmployment,"")
					,"|",IfNull(ProductID,"")
					)
			) AS HashKey 
			,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY coalesce(UniquePersonKey, BeneficiaryID, PlanMemberId) ORDER BY FileID DESC) AS RowNumber
		FROM Member 
)
WHERE
RowNumber = 1
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript:
MERGE INTO DestinationTable t
USING (SELECT * FROM tempSQLScript)s ON coalesce(s.UniquePersonKey,s.BeneficiaryID,s.PlanMemberId) = coalesce(t.UniquePersonKey,t.BeneficiaryID,t.PlanMemberId)
WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashKey <> s.HashKey THEN 
UPDATE SET
 ClientID = s.ClientID
,FileID = s.FileID
,LoadDateTime = s.LoadDateTime
,FileLayoutID = s.FileLayoutID
,FileLayoutDescription = s.FileLayoutDescription
,TransactionType = s.TransactionType
,UniquePersonKey = s.UniquePersonKey
